message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 基于GitHub的实验管理平台--学生列表用例的顺序图

actor "users" as user1
participant "首页" as home
participant "登录" as login
participant "选择登录身份" as selectRole

user1 -> home : 查看所有学生列表

alt 如果users是老师
    home -> login
    login -> selectRole
else 如果users是students
    home -> login
    login -> selectRole
end

actor "users" as user2
@enduml
```
